meta.title: misisimi — Zero2Done Execution
meta.description: misisimi is a client-first execution partner for SMEs. We embed AI into daily operations to increase efficiency and profitability.

hero.title: Build and deploy practical AI systems for your business — without complexity
hero.subtitle: We diagnose the right opportunity, design the right system, and implement AI solutions that automate workflows, reduce costs, and produce measurable operational value.

problem.title: Most businesses know AI matters — but don’t know where to start
problem.subtitle: The problem is rarely a lack of interest. It is usually a lack of operational clarity, integration, and a realistic path to execution.

items.title: Manual work creates avoidable cost and throughput loss
items.problem: Teams still rely on repetitive handoffs, spreadsheet work, and manual follow-up across core processes.
items.opportunity: MISISIMI automates the bottlenecks so teams can focus on higher-value execution.

items.title: Business data exists, but it does not drive daily decisions
items.problem: Important operational and commercial data is scattered across systems and rarely turned into actionable insight.
items.opportunity: MISISIMI turns raw data into usable models, dashboards, and decision support.

items.title: Tools do not talk to each other in a usable workflow
items.problem: Businesses often have multiple SaaS tools, but no integrated flow connecting data, actions, and business outcomes.
items.opportunity: MISISIMI connects tools, workflows, and AI logic into one operational system.

items.title: AI sounds valuable, but buying and implementation feel unclear
items.problem: Leaders know AI matters, but many projects stall because the path from idea to deployment feels expensive, risky, or vague.
items.opportunity: MISISIMI starts with a diagnostic and translates AI into a scoped, practical rollout.

services.title: What we actually deliver
services.subtitle: Three service layers, each presented as a complete offer with scope, implementation components, and concrete outputs.

items.title: AI Development
items.body: We design and build custom AI systems tailored to your operations and data model.

items.title: AI Consulting
items.body: We help you identify where AI creates ROI, what to prioritize, and how to implement it.

items.title: AI Automation Tools
items.body: We ship lightweight tools that automate repetitive work quickly and integrate with your existing stack.

approach.title: How engagement works from first diagnostic to production rollout
approach.subtitle: One engagement model: diagnose the opportunity, build the system, then deploy and improve it inside real business operations.

items.title: Find the highest-value AI opportunity first
items.description: We review operations, data, constraints, and handoff points to identify where AI can create measurable business value.
items.output: Diagnostic brief, prioritized use cases, and ROI direction

items.title: Design and implement the right system
items.description: We translate the selected opportunity into architecture, workflows, integrations, and production-ready engineering work.
items.output: Solution design, implementation, and integrated delivery

items.title: Launch with ownership and iteration
items.description: We deploy the system into real operations, validate outcomes, and refine performance based on live usage.
items.output: Production release, monitoring, and an optimization loop

pricing.title: Pricing aligned with delivered capabilities — not hours
pricing.subtitle: Pricing is structured around deliverables and business scope, not time spent. The diagnostic is the entry point, then project scope expands through value credits.

principle.title: Value Credit System
principle.benefit: Commercial scope stays tied to outputs, which makes planning, approval, and expectation-setting much clearer.

entryOffer.title: AI Diagnostic
entryOffer.output: You get a clear problem framing, opportunity map, and recommendation for what to build next.
entryOffer.action: Use the diagnostic to decide whether the next step should be automation, a custom system, or a phased delivery roadmap.

projectRange.title: Credit Scale
projectRange.use: This gives a realistic range for phased delivery instead of an abstract estimate disconnected from deliverables.

useCases.title: Where AI creates immediate value
useCases.subtitle: Representative problem-solution-outcome patterns that translate well into fast, measurable implementations.

items.title: Operations Automation
items.problem: Manual workflows consume time and create bottlenecks.
items.solution: Automated workflows using AI plus integrations.

items.title: Customer Support AI
items.problem: High volume of repetitive customer queries.
items.solution: AI assistants trained on company data and operating logic.

items.title: Data Insights and Forecasting
items.problem: Decisions are made without structured operational insight.
items.solution: Predictive models, dashboards, and data-backed decision support.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: The core questions buyers usually need answered before starting a diagnostic or delivery engagement.

questions.a: We deliver AI diagnostics, strategic roadmaps, automation workflows, custom AI systems, and production-ready implementations integrated into existing business operations.

The service is built for businesses that want applied AI outcomes without hiring a full internal AI team. It fits especially well when operations, customer workflows, or internal decision-making already generate useful data.
The diagnostic reviews your business process, current tools, data readiness, bottlenecks, and opportunities. The output is a clear recommendation on what to automate or build first and why.
Diagnostics usually take 24 to 72 hours. Delivery projects typically run between 2 and 8 weeks depending on integration complexity, data quality, and scope.

questions.q: Do I need internal technical knowledge?
questions.a: No. MISISIMI handles architecture, implementation, and deployment. Your team mainly provides business context, access to relevant systems, and feedback during validation.

questions.q: Do you integrate with existing systems?
questions.a: Yes. Integration is part of the delivery model. The goal is not a disconnected demo, but a working system that fits into your existing stack and operating process.
Pricing starts with a fixed diagnostic and then expands through scope-based value credits. This keeps costs tied to actual deliverables rather than open-ended hourly billing.

After the diagnostic, you receive a recommendation for the next implementation step. That may be a focused automation, a custom AI system, or a phased roadmap, depending on what creates the best return.

Only the data required for the engagement is accessed. The default approach is to minimize access, work inside existing operational boundaries, and define what data is needed before implementation starts.
Yes. Post-deployment support and optimization can be included when the solution needs monitoring, iteration, or operational handoff.

contact.title: Get Your AI Diagnostic
contact.description: Start with a clear understanding of where AI fits your business. We review your operations, identify the best AI opportunity, and outline the fastest path to implementation.

trust.label: Engagement
trust.text: Diagnostic first, then scoped delivery based on clear implementation priorities.

trust.label: Scope
trust.text: Suitable for automation, internal tools, applied AI systems, and operational integration projects.

form.name: Name
form.message: Tell us about the core complexity or bottleneck you want to solve

success.title: Diagnostic Requested
success.text: Thank you. We'll review your business profile and contact you within 24–72 hours.

footer.tagline: Turning AI concept into production-ready business value.
